prompt: Subject is the exact woman from the reference image, kneeling gracefully on a traditional woven mat inside a sunlit corridor of the Palace. She is interacting with a collection of historical photographs spread out before her, her fingers delicately touching the aged paper. The white silk of her Ao Dai is spread around her, showing the intricate weave of the fabric and how it catches the low-angle light. Her expression is focused, with sharp focus on her eyes and long eyelashes. The environment features yellow-painted walls and green shutters typical of the era. Lighting is low-angle morning sun creating long shadows and highlighting the texture of the wooden floor. Shot with a Sony A1, 50mm f/1.2 lens, high-angle shot looking down at her.
